name: allscale-agentic-commerce-gateway
description: MVP demo for AllScale agentic commerce settlement on HashKey-compatible chains.

scripts.compile:contracts: node scripts/compile.js SettlementGateway && node scripts/compile.js MockERC20
scripts.check:js: node --check server/demo-api.js && node --check scripts/deploy.js && node --check scripts/deploy-mainnet.js && node --check scripts/approve-mainnet-usdc.js && node --check scripts/deploy-mock-token.js && node --check scripts/e2e-demo.js && node --check scripts/contract-smoke-test.js
